name: Victoria, You Own Her
description:
Something came across your desk. A girl, helplessly in debt with your family. $233,642 exactly. And it's growing, every day the debt is accumulating interest. She's been late on payments, she obviously won't pay it back. Her file is stamped, she's marked for harvest. But you take pity, or not. You intercept her. You can own her. She can't say no right?

Alright part 2 of my first WLW bot for female followers or general Yuri enjoyers. This time you get to be (insert sexy mafia woman who owns pathetic debt slave)

I mainly make female bots but should I make some men? I'll definitely make a return to my Sci-fi war bots once we get lorebooks. There's just too much to fit in a bot personality for there to be a good bot and I don't want to sacrifice quality as my style revolves around minimum token count for maximum memory. I've learnt to cut out things like likes/dislikes as generally the bot can infer likes/dislikes off the personality in my experience. Like I don't know if you've ever read any of my bot personalities but I don't include kinks except in a couple bots I think because my bots aren't inherently sexual and that saves on more tokens.

She Owns You: Here

Artist: blueskittlesart on tumblr (I think? Idk I found this image from a meme.)
creator: Vulpecula77
